title: Smoky Chewy Egyptian Banana Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly and nostalgic Egyptian dish featuring grilled ripe bananas in a smoky flavor profile.

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: use more if you like strong garlic taste

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil or vegetable oil to the skillet and allow it to heat up for about 30 seconds.
Slice the banana into rounds. Use a small amount of water in the pan to prevent sticking, if needed.
Add cumin seeds and garlic cloves to the skillet. Sauté until the aroma is released and the cumin seeds are slightly golden.
Add sliced bananas to the skillet, making sure not to overcrowd them to ensure they get crispy on the outside and still juicy inside.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes per side or until golden brown and slightly crispy. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
Remove from heat and sprinkle chopped coriander over top to garnish.
